issues.description: Missing static ability for Blocker and +3 cost conditional on Leader type. Card has two separate effects: (1) static conditional ability, (2) On Play optional ability with condition.
OnPlay action is missing the condition check: 'If your opponent has 5 or more cards in their hand'. The thenActions should only execute if opponent hand size >= 5.
TrashFromHand should include optional/may clause. The effect text says 'You may trash 1 card' - this should be reflected in optional behavior, and count should be exactly 1.
ForceDiscard action is missing the condition that opponent must have 5+ cards in hand before opponent trashes 2 cards.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
If your Leader is [Koala] or [Monkey.D.Luffy], this Character gains [Blocker] and +3 cost.
[On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: If your opponent has 5 or more cards in their hand, your opponent trashes 2 cards from their hand.
